apply_method.name: Apply Method
apply_method.description: Executes a method and validates improvement before keeping or rejecting

steps.description: Validate method exists and parameters are valid

evaluate_current_state.name: Evaluate Current State
evaluate_current_state.description: Analyzes current AutoCast performance and identifies weaknesses

steps.description: Load current WER/CER from evaluations collection
Find methods that could improve the gap

generate_improvements.name: Generate Improvements
generate_improvements.description: Generates new method proposals by analyzing patterns in runs and evaluations, then creates hypotheses and mutates embeddings to suggest improvements

steps.description: Analyze runs and evaluations to identify patterns
Generate 3 hypothesis candidates based on identified patterns
Create 3 new method variants via embedding mutation
Rank new variants by expected success and feasibility
Validate proposals against constraints and approve top 3

next_workflows.description: After user selects a proposal, apply_method can be triggered

identified_patterns.name: high_success_methods
identified_patterns.description: Methods with >80% success rate show consistent improvements

identified_patterns.name: parameter_correlation
identified_patterns.description: Certain parameter combinations correlate with better WER reduction

identified_patterns.name: category_synergy
identified_patterns.description: Combining duration and silence methods shows multiplicative effects

hypothesis_candidates.title: Adaptive Silence Threshold with Context Awareness
hypothesis_candidates.hypothesis: Dynamisch angepasste Silence-Thresholds basierend auf Hintergrundgeräusch-Level verbessern die Segmentierung
hypothesis_candidates.description: Nutzt Kontext-Informationen aus vorherigen Segmenten, um Silence-Thresholds adaptiv anzupassen

hypothesis_candidates.title: Cross-Method Duration Balancing
hypothesis_candidates.hypothesis: Kombinierte Optimierung von Padding und Merge-Windows führt zu konsistenteren Segment-Dauern
hypothesis_candidates.description: Synchronisiert duration_padding und merge_window Parameter für bessere Gesamtergebnisse

hypothesis_candidates.title: Review Corridor with Uncertainty Quantification
hypothesis_candidates.hypothesis: Explizite Unsicherheitsmodellierung in Review-Entscheidungen reduziert Fehlklassifikationen
hypothesis_candidates.description: Erweitert Review-Corridor um Confidence-Intervalle für unsichere Fälle
